events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Given the submittal is missing both the OEM product listing page and the project note needed to determine whether the proposed torque shortcut is allowed, the decision is `needs_more_info` (medium risk) — fastening work should pause pending that documentation and engineering review, while non-fastening prep can continue.
